problem id: 2a5d4790
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  00000111 -> 01110011
  11011110 -> 11101111
  01000000 -> 00100100
  01111100 -> 11111111
  11100110 -> 01111111
  10111100 -> 11011111
  00000011 -> 00110001
  00101100 -> 11010110

query: 01111111
predicted answer: 11111111
